query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_faturado,
  COUNT(DISTINCT codigo_item) as itens_unicos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN valor_glosado > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_glosado,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN valor_glosado > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as taxa_glosa_geral
FROM recebimento_tiss rt
WHERE rt.convenioId = 1
AND DATE(rt.data_importacao) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)
AND rt.estabelecimentoId = 1
